creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 175380
svn(1) diff of devel/bossa update to official 1.7.0

Hello!

Attached is a patch to update devel/bossa to the official 1.7.0 tagged release. This offers *no* functional change - the 1.7.0 tag landed on the same commit this port uses, this is solely an update to soothe the aching portscout and bring PORTVERSION back to a non-synthetic release.
